name: Ocal Browser V7.7.03
body:
OCAL BROWSER - STABLE RELEASE CATALOG
Version: 7.7.03
Release Date: July 16, 2026

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[INNO SETUP STABLE BUILD]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* ICON EMBEDDING FIX: Added rcedit post-processing step to stamp custom Ocal icon.ico directly into the Windows executable, resolving the persistent Electron default icon in the taskbar.
* ELECTRON BRANDING REMOVAL: Excluded LICENSE.electron.txt and LICENSES.chromium.html from installer to eliminate all visible Electron references.
* BUILD PIPELINE HARDENING: Integrated automatic rcedit icon stamping into build-dist.ps1 so the custom icon is applied on every build.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[PRODUCT STABILITY & USER EXPERIENCE]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* STABLE CHANNEL RELEASE: Promoted the browser to stable 7.7.03, focused on taskbar icon correctness and clean branding.
* TASKBAR IDENTITY FIX: Resolved the issue where Windows taskbar showed the default Electron icon instead of the Ocal Browser icon by stamping the icon directly into the executable binary.
* DEFAULT TAB ON LAUNCH: Ensured at least one tab always opens when the browser launches, with What's New page shown on first run of a new version.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
[FEATURE HIGHLIGHTS]
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
* INTEGRATED MEDIA MASTER: Better media popup handling with explicit browser view cleanup and faster UI response for video downloads.
* MULTITASKING EXPERIENCE: Stabilized side-by-side split browsing and overlay ordering for sidebar and web app panels.
* SECURITY & PRIVACY: Reinforced custom protocol reveals.
